title: (SSRDFV) Separate Sable Render Distance For Voxy!
description: Adds a slider that overide sables sublevel render distance allowing you to see sublevels from much further away.
body:
# FANTASTICAL DESCRIPTION
This is a temporary mod for allowing Aeronautics sublevel render distances when using voxy. Letting you see loaded contraptions from much farther away! I personally find that this makes dog fights so much Better, and it makes finding friends airships much easier.


# DEBUGGING
(If it isnt working you need to change the Sub Level Tracking Range in the Sable Config.)

# ORIGINAL CREDIT
Originally based off of another mod for Distant Horizons
[SSRD](https://modrinth.com/mod/ssrd)

most of the coding credit goes to the legend [Ranold](https://modrinth.com/user/Ranold)!
